query:
ALTER TABLE property_tours 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS videoMode ENUM('standard', 'ai-enhanced', 'full-ai') DEFAULT 'standard',
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS enableVoiceover BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS voiceId VARCHAR(100);
